Home on the Range (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,026,353Details
International Box Office $26,456,108
Worldwide Box Office $76,482,461
Further financial details...

Opening Weekend:$13,880,771 (27.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:65.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,047 opening theaters/3,058 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $96,347,045

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 2nd, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: September 16th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)

Running Time: 76 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Voiceover/Narration
